title: Okami Music Pack
description: Experience the beautiful soundtrack of Okami and Okamiden (and Okami Sequel, whenever that is) as you play the game!
body:
I'm a HUGE fan of Okami for a multitude of reasons, and the music is definitely one of them. This pack replaces the menu and in-game music with a total of 82 tracks across Okami (60) and Okamiden (22). If you use the music toasts feature, the tracks have proper names and artist info in English US. Once Okami 2 has an official soundtrack available, this will be updated with more tracks. Song list below the embed.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/-G_pupNStIs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**Please support the official soundtrack release on Steam. This resource pack was made without profit in mind. https://store.steampowered.com/app/587620/Okami_HD/**
